radicchio-salad.name: Radicchio Salad

ingredients.item: . plus 1 0.5 tsp. sherry vinegar or apple cider vinegar

instructions: Mix sour cream, yogurt, vinegar, grated garlic, honey, and 5 Tbsp. oil in a small bowl; season dressing with salt.

Heat remaining 3 Tbsp. oil in a medium skillet over medium. Add crushed garlic and scallions and cook, stirring often, until golden brown around the edges, about 4 minutes. Add panko and season with salt. Cook, stirring often, until golden brown, about 3 minutes. Finely grate lemon zest directly into pan and toss a few times to incorporate. Transfer breadcrumbs to paper towels to drain; let cool. Taste and season with more salt if needed.
Place radicchio in a large bowl. Drizzle with dressing; toss gently to coat. Season with salt and scatter breadcrumbs over.
Do Ahead: Dressing and breadcrumbs can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill dressing. Store breadcrumbs airtight at room temperature.

ramen-noodles-with-miso-pesto.name: Ramen Noodles With Miso Pesto

ingredients.prep: you can find them fresh at Asian grocery stores and some Whole Foods—we like the Sun Noodle brand

instructions: Bring a medium pot of water to a boil.
Meanwhile, purée spinach, cilantro, miso, garlic, grapeseed oil, sesame oil, and lemon juice in a blender until mixture is smooth and very green. Season with salt and pour pesto into a medium bowl.
Cook noodles according to package directions. Drain and add to bowl with pesto. Add butter and toss until butter is melted and noodles are coated in sauce.
Divide noodles between bowls and top with sesame seeds.
Do Ahead: Pesto can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill. Color might darken slightly.

raspberry-sorbet.name: Raspberry Sorbet
instructions: Place raspberries in the bowl of a food processor; blend until smooth. If an extra smooth sorbet is desired, press pureed raspberries through a fine sieve to remove seeds. Whisk together pureed raspberries and honey in a large bowl.

Combine 3 cups of water, sugar, and corn syrup in a large saucepan; stir to combine. Bring to a boil over high heat. Boil until sugar is dissolved, without stirring, about 2 minutes. Stir sugar water and remaining 1 cup of water into raspberry puree.

Make an ice bath by filling a very large bowl with water and ice. Set the bowl of raspberry puree in the ice bath, and whisk until cool. Pour cooled puree into a 9x13-inch baking dish; cover and freeze until solid, 6 to 8 hours.
To make a coarsely textured granita, use a fork to scrape frozen puree into small crumbs. For a deliciously silky sorbet, transfer frozen puree to a food processor and process until smooth.

recipe-for-onions-stuffed-with-rice-and-.name: Recipe For Onions Stuffed With Rice And Herbs
recipe-for-onions-stuffed-with-rice-and-.original_name: Receta de cebollas rellenas de arroz y hierbas
instructions: Cooking the rice earlier so that it's resting as soon as you fill the onions. Just get his dente and let him go.
Peel the onions and cut the top. Take back the centre of the vegetable and don't discard it. Fan her.
Filetea los dientes de ajo hasta que queden finos.
Preheat the oven at 180 ° C
Warm up a frying pan and melt the butter.
Fold garlic and onion for a few minutes until clear.
It incorporates rice, oregano, rosemary and basil. Saxony with salt and pepper.
Mezcla muy bien y cocina por unos 4 minutos hasta que el arroz tome el sabor de las hierbas.
Turn off and put the rice into a bowl. Using hot, add mozzarella and blend cheese.
Rellena las cebollas y coloca en una bandeja.
Vierte el vino blanco y hornea de 12 a 15 minutos o hasta que las cebollas ablanden.
When ready, remove from the oven and let some rest.

recipe-for-rigatoni-bolognese-comedera.name: Recipe For Rigatoni Bolognese
recipe-for-rigatoni-bolognese-comedera.original_name: Receta de rigatoni a la boloñesa
instructions: Pela la cebolla y trocea. Haz lo mismo con los dientes de ajo.
Warm an olive oil casserole and soften your garlic teeth by the onion till clear.
Incorpora la carne molida y mezcla. Cocina hasta que cambie de color.
Vierte el vino tinto y desglasa el fondo. Cocina hasta que el licor evapore.
Add tomato paste, crushed tomatoes and meat stock. Mix, rectify salt and pepper.
Fitted with low heat for 30 minutes till meat is tender and salsa forms.
After that time, incorporates the basil leaves, pint of sugar and cook for about 5 more minutes and put out the fire.
Retira las hojas de albahaca para que no se oxiden.
It steals rigatoni into abundant water with salt, following the cooking steps of the package so that they will stay with the dente.
Once ready, mix rigatoni with bolognese sauce.
Serve and accompany with parmesan cheese at best.

recipe-for-sweaty-fish-in-wine-comedera.name: Recipe For Sweaty Fish In Wine
recipe-for-sweaty-fish-in-wine-comedera.original_name: Receta de pescado sudado al vino

ingredients.item: 2  filetes o ruedas de pescado blanco con o sin piel ((elige el de tu preferencia))
2 cda of yellow bean paste (you can replace it with paprika)

instructions: Let's start our recipe, get our fish steaks and wash them. If you can see they're big. you can cut them in half.
Sazona con sal y pimienta los trozos de pescado. Reserva.
Warm with olive oil a frying pan. He cuts his onion and his pimenton and his chilies into julians. Fold the garlic.
When the frying pan's hot, add the garlic to drink and then onion. When they are clear, you will add your pimenton and finish pumping the vegetables.
Then you'll add his fish pieces, mix carefully with the vegetables, cover and let them cook for 4 minutes.
While cooking, you're going to join the white wine with the yellow bean or paptika and lemon.
After 4 minutes, you will put down the fire and add a mixture of white wine, ham and lemon to the fish. You'll mix up and let them cook for 10 minutes. You'll add some salt and pepper.
Then you'll put up the fire till the white wine's reduced till the broth's dense but juicy.
Finally, you will spread the parsley that will give a special touch to our fish and we will turn off. Let them stand and serve.
Now, you'll have a super delicious plate. Enjoy!

red-cabbage-salad-with-warm-pancetta-bal.name: Red Cabbage Salad With Warm Pancetta-balsamic Dressing
instructions: Place currants in small bowl. Heat vinegar in saucepan over medium heat until hot (do not boil). Pour vinegar over currants; let soak until currants soften, 15 to 20 minutes.

Place cabbage in large bowl; set aside. Heat large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add pancetta; sauté until brown and crisp, about 5 minutes. Add shallot to pancetta and drippings in skillet; sauté 1 minute. Remove from heat. Stir in currant-vinegar mixture and olive oil. Season with salt and freshly ground black pepper.
Pour pancetta mixture over cabbage and toss to coat. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Let stand 5 to 10 minutes. Add almonds and parsley; toss to blend.

red-curry-pork-and-rice-cake-stir-fry.name: Red Curry Pork And Rice Cake Stir-fry

ingredients.prep:
white and pale green and dark green parts separated,
thinly sliced

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place 1 lb. sliced Korean rice cakes in a medium bowl; pour in cold water to cover. Let sit 10 minutes. Drain, reserving 1 cup rice cake soaking liquid.

Heat 1 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a large skillet with a lid over medium-high. Cook 1 lb. ground pork, undisturbed, until browned underneath, about 5 minutes. Break up meat with a wooden spoon and continue to cook, stirring and breaking up into large pieces, until browned all over but still pink in places, about 2 minutes more.

Add 3 scallions, white and pale green parts thinly sliced, one 2" piece ginger, peeled, finely chopped, and 5 garlic cloves, finely chopped; cook, stirring, until softened, about 2 minutes. Add ¼ cup red curry paste and cook, stirring, until paste is fragrant and slightly darkened and beginning to stick to bottom of pan, about 3 minutes. Add 3 medium red and/or yellow bell peppers, cut into 1" pieces, and stir to coat.

Stir in 1 Tbsp. fish sauce, 1 Tbsp. unseasoned rice vinegar, and 1 tsp. honey, scraping up any browned bits. Add rice cakes, ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and reserved rice cake soaking liquid; stir to combine. Bring to a simmer, cover, and cook, stirring occasionally, until rice cakes are softened, about 5 minutes. Uncover and cook, stirring, until sauce is thickened, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat. Taste and season with more salt if needed.
Divide stir-fry among shallow bowls. Top with 3 dark green scallion tops, thinly sliced.

reduced-sugar-spiced-apple-butter.name: Reduced Sugar Spiced Apple Butter
instructions: Stir chopped apples, brown sugar, apple cider vinegar, cinnamon, cloves, and salt together in a slow cooker.
Cook on Low until the apples are soft enough to mash easily with a fork, 8 to 10 hours.
Puree apple mixture with an immersion blender until smooth.
Cook uncovered until some of the liquid reduces and the color is dark brown, about 1 hour.

reeses-ice-cream-recipe-comedera.name: Reese's Ice Cream Recipe
instructions: In a deep bowl, add the previously chilled pounding cream and put it up to a snow point.
It incorporates condensed milk and gently mixes with wrapped movements using a spatula.
Cut the Reese's mini into pieces and add them to the mixture, integrating them well.
Fold the mixture into a freezer-suitable container and add peanut butter and liquid chocolate to your taste and mix slightly to create a marble effect.
Cubre el recipiente y deja reposar en el congelador por al menos 8 horas.
Serve and enjoy this creamy ice cream with more chocolate or Reese & # 039 pieces as a décor.

rice-pudding-with-rose-water.name: Rice Pudding With Rose Water
instructions: Bring milk and sugar to a boil in a saucepan. Add rice; cook and stir until it comes to a boil. Reduce heat to low; cook until very creamy, about 45 minutes. Add more milk if mixture becomes too thick.

Stir in rose water until bubbles appear on the surface. Remove saucepan from heat; cool slightly. Pour rice pudding into a bowl; refrigerate until chilled, at least 1 hour. Serve pudding cold with almonds sprinkled on top.

rifaki-yachni-with-honeyed-potatoes-argi.name: Rifaki Yachni With Honeyed Potatoes
instructions: Simmer the goat in a bowl with water and wash it by rubbing it with the fingers, so that any small bones leave.
Dry it well with absorbent paper and sprinkle with some salt and pepper.
Heat in a wide pot and medium to high heat the olive oil and armor the meat from all sides, to take color.

Sauté it in two doses, so that the temperature of the oil does not fall, by reserving the ports that we Wash in a bowl, where we keep them covered and warm. The whole processes takes about 10 minutes, until the beat makes a nice crust.
When we finish with the goat, sauté the opinions for 5-6 minutes, stringing with a seed until they become transparent and softened.
Add the garage and sauce for 1 minute.
Add the tomato paste and rub it on the base of the pot for 1 minute and remove all its flavors.
Add the goat to the pot along with the broths it has taken out in the bowl and, as soon as it warms up, put the wine out.
Allow the food to boil and add the tomato, spice, bay, oregano, some salt and freshly ground pepper.
As soon as it boils, lower the heat – where the food is hot – and cover the pot.
Simmer for about an hour and 45 minutes until the meat melts with the fork.
During cooking, check and correct salt and pepper.
Clean the potatoes, wash them and cut them into thick slices 1.5-2 cm thick.

Heat in a wide pan and heat the olive oil and fry the potatoes, stirring regularly for about 10 minutes. We don't want them to take color or form a crust, but to become transparent to suck the sauce from the goat to the boil.
We put them in a vessel and keep them warm and covered until we add them to the sauce and complete the cooking.
As soon as the meat softens, pour half the fried potatoes into the pot. Do not mix to prevent them breaking up, but shake the pot from the handles to get wet with the sauce.
Cover and simmer for about 15 minutes until the potatoes melt and suck the sauce from the yahni.
Turn off the food and leave it covered for 5-10 minutes.
Serve the potatoes on a platter and place the goat on top, pouring the food with sauce.

ritz-cuban-minis.name: Ritz Cuban Minis

ingredients.item: Fully cooked pulled pork without the sauce*

instructions: {'step': '1', 'description': 'Preheat broiler on HIGH. Set an oven rack about 5 to 6 inches from the heat source. Line a large baking sheet with foil.'}

{'step': '2', 'description': 'With two forks, break apart any large chunks of the packaged pulled pork. Place the pork between several layers of paper towels and press, to get it as dry as possible. (This will help prevent the cracker from softening before serving.)'}

roasted-cauliflower-larb.name: Roasted Cauliflower Larb

ingredients.prep: cut into large florets with some stalk attached
tough outer layers removed, finely chopped

ingredients.item: Sliced persian cucumber and bibb lettuce leaves

instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. Toss cauliflower with oil on a rimmed baking sheet. Roast, tossing occasionally, until tender and well browned, 35–45 minutes. Let cool slightly; chop into pea-size pieces. Transfer to a large bowl. Add chiles, lemongrass, lime leaves, fish sauce, and lime juice; toss well.

Meanwhile, place rice in a medium skillet and set over medium heat. Toast, shaking pan constantly to keep rice moving, until evenly browned, 10–15 minutes. Transfer to a plate; let cool. Grind in spice mill to a semifine powder.
Toss scallions, pea shoots, cilantro, mint, and 2 tsp. toasted rice powder into cauliflower mixture; season with salt. Serve with cucumber, lettuce, and remaining rice powder to make lettuce cups.

roasted-sweet-potatoes-and-onions.name: Roasted Sweet Potatoes And Onions

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).
Toss sweet potatoes, onions, olive oil, amaretto, thyme, salt and pepper in a shallow medium-sized baking dish.
Cover and bake in the preheated oven for 30 minutes. Uncover and bake 20 minutes more. Sprinkle with toasted almonds.
